name: SplitLayout
description: Positions start and end items at opposite ends of a container with responsive direction and spacing control.

as.description: Polymorphic root element for semantic HTML rendering.

startItem.description: Start component rendered at the beginning of layout main axis.

endItem.description: End component rendered at the opposite end of layout main axis.

direction.description: Main-axis direction for arranging start and end items.

gap.description: Space between start and end items.

slots.startItem: Content aligned to start side of SplitLayout.
slots.endItem: Content aligned to end side of SplitLayout.

keyboard: Tab / Shift+Tab — move focus between interactive descendants in layout order
aria: Use semantic HTML via the as prop for meaningful structure (for example ul/li patterns)
Ensure child items provide their own accessible names and semantics
